$comment: scripts/Route16FlyHouse.asm — the secret-path girl's HM02 (FLY). give_item's abort = the retired _gift (no flag, re-offer).

then.text:
Isn't FLY the
best? You can go
back to any town
in a flash!

else.text:
My bird POKéMON
uses FLY to whisk
me to any town! I want you to
have this!

HM02 is FLY! Teach it to a bird
POKéMON to soar
to any town
you've visited!
